title: Bocchi the Glock: Refurbished
description: Bocchi... but she's a Glock! Now improved upon!
body: Bocchi the Glock: Refurbished adds from [EtwasPhoenix's Bocchi the Glock mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/bocchi-the-glock-mod) making it craftable in survival, adding a new Bocchi Ice Cube, better shooting, more damage, and a new Bocchi Ingot! Therefore making it possible to craft and viable to use in survival!
